quoteFirst: Next, he remembered that the morrow of Christmas would be the twenty-seventh day of the moon, and that consequently high water would be at
quoteLast: , the half-ebb at a quarter past seven, low water at thirty-three minutes past nine, and half flood at thirty-nine minutes past twelve.
title: Toilers of the sea
author: Hugo, Victor, 1802-1885; Rhys, Ernest, 1859-1946 [Editor]; Thomas, W. Moy (William Moy), 1828-1910 [Translator]
